backbone: sequential recommendation model (e.g., GRU4Rec, SASRec) with intent encoder
loss: contrastive self-supervised learning (InfoNCE) + sequential recommendation loss (e.g., cross-entropy)
key_idea: learn latent intent distributions via clustering and maximize agreement between sequence views and their corresponding intents via contrastive SSL within an EM framework
datasets: four real-world datasets (not named in abstract)
